[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000010 3
1 10001010 3
2 10000100 2
3 11010111 6
4 00101010 3
5 11000101 4
6 11011111 7
7 11111111 a

01 00000000 a
12 00100101 3
23 01010000 2
34 00101001 3
45 00000000 a
56 11010000 3
67 00001111 4
70 00110000 2

02 00000100 1
13 01000000 1
24 00001000 1
35 00000001 1
46 11010000 3
57 11001110 5
60 00101011 4
71 00010000 1

03 00000000 a
14 00100001 2
25 00000000 a

50 11111010 6

72 00100000 1

73 00010000 1
